title: Village Guidance — The Forest
description: After the cave, Elder Theron points toward Eldertree and the corrupted forest.

lines.speaker: Elder Theron
lines.text: You came back. Good. The corruption from the cave — it's spreading east. The forest near Eldertree Village is dying.

lines.speaker: Elder Theron
lines.text: Head east on the road. Eldertree's people know more than we do about what's happening. The Forest Keeper especially.

lines.speaker: Elder Theron
lines.text: And be careful. Whatever is in that forest was put there deliberately.
